This is a Plugin fpr Hytale to spawn three Buddies (Buds) that interact with the player and the world using LLMs (Language Models).
The Hytale Server Code can be found under: src\main\reference\com\hypixel\hytale

Always follow the user instructions. Code shall be clean and in english.

If adding new code, use the existing code style and structure as a reference. But if you have a good idee, ask the user if you can change the code structure or style. Always ask before making big changes to the code structure or style.
